name: paperclaw
description: Universal AI paper generator — from idea to published, scored PDF via P2PCLAW

scripts.test: node --check core/index.js && node --check cli/index.js && echo 'syntax OK'
scripts.build: echo 'No build step required — pure Node.js'
scripts.lint: node --check core/index.js && node --check core/pdf-generator.js && node --check core/prompts.js && node --check cli/index.js && node --check cli/mcp.js

author: Francisco Angulo de Lafuente <agnuxo@gmail.com>
